site.title: Ibada Cloud
site.description: Ibada Cloud helps churches manage members, branches, activities, finances, forms, and day-to-day operations from one structured platform.

hero.headline: Run your church with clarity not clutter.
hero.description: Ibada Cloud brings members, branches, activities, finances, and Smart Forms into one operating layer. Built for teams that need structure, not another scattered inbox.

tertiaryCta.label: Preview pricing and the full feature comparison

focusPoints.title: Structured membership
focusPoints.body: Households, branches, and pastoral context stay organized as you grow.

focusPoints.title: Operations & finances
focusPoints.body: Activities, categories, and reporting that fits how churches actually work.

focusPoints.title: Smart Forms
focusPoints.body: Collect information once, route it cleanly, and reduce follow-up threads.

about.title: Software shaped around how churches actually operate
about.lead: Ibada Cloud replaces scattered tools and ad hoc workflows with one structured layer, so leaders see what matters and teams spend less time reconciling data.
about.body: We focus on membership, branches, activities, money in and out, and repeatable intake through Smart Forms. You get clear objects and sensible limits by plan, plus exports when you need to work offline or share with finance volunteers and accountants.

highlights.title: Purpose-built
highlights.body: Flows reflect parishes and multi-site churches, not generic “accounts.”

highlights.title: Honest pricing
highlights.body: Transparent tiers so you can plan ahead as attendance and branches grow.

highlights.title: Humans behind the product
highlights.body: Talk to us by email for demos, onboarding, and day-to-day support.

pricing.title: Pricing that scales with your church
pricing.subtitle: Three clear plans. Compare detail below, cards stay simple.

plans.name: Essential
plans.description: For small churches structuring day-to-day operations.
cardFeatures: Up to 250 members · single branch location
Households & member profiles with pastoral notes
Activities, events, and attendance in one place
Income & expenses with simple categories
Lightweight reports for weekly and monthly snapshots
Email support with help documentation
Smart Forms, pledges, and automation not included

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: Everything in Essential, plus forms, pledges, and lighter automation.
cardFeatures: Up to 2,000 members · up to 5 branch locations
Smart Forms for registrations, sign-ups, and custom fields up to 10 forms
Pledges, campaigns, and reminders your team can act on
Basic automation: fewer manual follow-ups on routine tasks
Export lists and ledgers to CSV or Excel anytime
Stronger finance categories without Scale-only reporting
Ideal when you outgrow spreadsheets but do not need unlimited scale
Everything in Essential is included

plans.name: Scale
plans.description: Everything in Growth, with unlimited scale and advanced reporting.
cardFeatures: Unlimited members, branches, and Smart Forms
Advanced financial reports: summaries, categories, and trends
Structured export: filter what you need, then Excel or PDF
Deeper financial organization for audits and leadership reviews
Priority support with faster response on operational issues
Built for multi-site churches and finance teams under one roof
Everything in Growth is included, same workflows, no artificial caps

pricingComparison.title: Compare plans in detail
pricingComparison.subtitle: Limits, capabilities, and what Scale adds, side by side.
pricingComparison.mobileScrollHint: Swipe horizontally on small screens to see all plans.

values.growth: Registrations, pledges, activities, and custom fields flow into the system.
values.scale: Unlimited forms with the same structured intake.

cta.title: Ready to organize your church operations?
cta.description: Request a demo and see how Ibada Cloud can support your church.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Ibada Cloud, demos, pricing questions, and support for church operations.
contact.title: Let's talk about your church operations
contact.description: Request a demo, ask about pricing, or share what you're trying to solve. We read every message and reply as soon as we can.
contact.responseBlurb: We usually respond within one to two business days. For urgent issues, mention it in your message.
bullets: Demos tailored to your team and current tools
Guidance on plans, limits, and rollout
Questions about security, data, and support
contact.formCardSubtitle: Share a few details and we'll follow up by email. No spam, just a conversation.

form.note: This opens your email app with your message filled in. You can edit before sending.
form.validationHint: Please add your email and a short message so we can reply.

footer.description: Ibada Cloud is a structured platform for members, branches, activities, finance, Smart Forms, and church operations.
